# PongLens

> PongLens turns table tennis match videos into something you can study. Point your phone at the table, play your match, and upload the recording — PongLens cuts it down to just the rallies, removing the dead time between points. Placement heatmaps and spin analysis are in development.

PongLens is a match-analysis tool for table tennis players. It is a web-based product; you record a match, upload the video, and PongLens returns an edited version containing only live play, plus (upcoming) analysis of where shots land and the spin patterns of your opponent.

## What it does today
- Removes dead time between points, turning a long recording into just the rallies that matter.

## In development
- Placement heatmaps: where every ball lands across the table.
- Spin reading: your opponent's spin patterns, read from the footage.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.ponglens.com/): Product overview and what PongLens does.
- [Sign in](https://www.ponglens.com/login): Sign in to upload and analyze a match.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.ponglens.com/terms): Terms that govern use of PongLens.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.ponglens.com/privacy): How PongLens handles your videos and data.
